title: Silence From The Grave locks opponent magic after resolving

card.rawText: Discard 1 magic card to the cemetery to play this card. Destroy all magic cards on the field. For 2 turn cycles, your opponent cannot play magic cards and their creature effects are negated during your turn. The opponent may still respond with a valid Lightning card before this card resolves.

effect.value: Cannot play Magic for 2 turn cycles after this card resolves

plan.title: Silence From The Grave locks opponent magic after resolving
plan.summary: Resolve Silence From The Grave and verify the opponent Magic play lock is applied only after the initial response window.

notes: Keep Health Potion in hand for Silence's cost.

steps: Player 1 plays Silence From The Grave.
Pass the valid response window and resolve the chain.
manualVerification: Confirm the lock applies after Silence resolves and blocks later Magic plays, including Lightning.
riskNotes: The opponent may still respond with a valid Lightning card before this lock exists.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
